<div>Forward-looking statements involve risks and uncertainties.</div>
<div>Exhibit 31.1 Certification pursuant to Rule 13a-14(a)</div>

Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Revenue grew 78% year over year to $39.3 billion in the fourth quarter.
Data center revenue was $35.6 billion, up 93% year over year.
We expect first quarter revenue of $43.0 billion, plus or minus 2%.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Export controls may materially affect our ability to sell products in China.

Item 1. Financial Statements

Consolidated revenue was $39.3 billion for the quarter ended April 27, 2025.

<div>Signatures</div>
<div>Pursuant to Section 906 of the Sarbanes-Oxley Act</div>
